title: Recipe For A Baby:
content:
Clean and dress a wriggle, add a pint of nearly milk,
        Smother with a pillow any sneeze;
     Baste with talcum powder and mark upon its back -
        "Don't forget that you were one of these."

        - Life.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Recipe For A Baby:"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
